overview.intro: PLANT CONNECT PROVIDERS OF PLANT BASED PRODUCTS DIRECTLY WITH CONSUMERS
overview.body: - I rebuilt the mobile app with Expo, which scaled to +1k active users per month by implementing push notifications, over-the-air updates, and authentication, among other tools. - Use React Query for query optimization with caching and `zustand` to manage global state in the application.- I created styles using the Tamagui library to obtain a responsive user interface that could be used in mobile and web applications.
